title: Change all product image displays to square 1:1 aspect ratio

requirements.summary: Update all product image displays to use square 1:1 aspect ratio instead of 4:5
acceptanceCriteria: ProductCard.tsx renders product images with aspect-ratio: 1/1 and object-fit: cover
PhotoGallery.tsx renders the primary large image with aspect-ratio: 1/1 and object-fit: cover
PhotoGallery.tsx thumbnail strip images use aspect-ratio: 1/1 and object-fit: cover
ProductDetailModal.tsx renders product images with aspect-ratio: 1/1 and object-fit: cover
No product image container uses the old 4:5 ratio anywhere on the site
Images fill their containers without distortion on both mobile and desktop

file_operations.description: Update the product image container to use aspect-ratio: 1/1 and object-fit: cover instead of the current 4:5 ratio. Modify the div wrapping the img element to apply the square aspect ratio styling while maintaining responsive behavior on both mobile and desktop.

Update both the primary large image display and the thumbnail strip to use aspect-ratio: 1/1 and object-fit: cover. Replace the existing 4:5 ratio with 1:1 for the main photo container and ensure all thumbnails in the strip also render as squares.

Update the product image display within the modal to use aspect-ratio: 1/1 and object-fit: cover. Ensure the PhotoGallery component rendered inside the modal inherits the square aspect ratio and displays correctly on both mobile and desktop viewports.
